title: melica × aschersonii
intro: Melica × aschersonii, also known as Ascherson's melic grass, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Melica, which is a type of grass native to Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Melica × aschersonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, which are used topically to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
